CPR-CHUD.settings.enabled.name: Enable Combat HUD
CPR-CHUD.settings.enabled.hint: Show the combat HUD bar at the bottom of the screen.
CPR-CHUD.settings.fallbackToCharacter.hi: When no token is selected, show the HUD for your assigned character instead of hiding it.
CPR-CHUD.settings.scale.name: HUD scale
CPR-CHUD.settings.scale.hint: Overall size of the HUD bar.
CPR-CHUD.settings.bottomOffset.name: Distance from bottom (px)
CPR-CHUD.settings.bottomOffset.hint: How far above the bottom edge of the screen the HUD bar sits.
CPR-CHUD.keybindings.toggle.name: Toggle Combat HUD
CPR-CHUD.keybindings.toggle.hint: Collapse or expand the combat HUD bar.
CPR-CHUD.bar.deathSavePenalty: Death save penalty (click to roll, right-click to reset penalty)
CPR-CHUD.panel.skills.title: Skills
CPR-CHUD.panel.skills.favorite: Toggle favorite (shown in the favorites row of the HUD bar)
CPR-CHUD.panel.roles.title: Role Abilities
CPR-CHUD.panel.interface.title: Interface Abilities
CPR-CHUD.panel.gear.title: Weapons & Equip State
CPR-CHUD.panel.gear.equipHint: Click to cycle: owned, carried, equipped
CPR-CHUD.warn.noCombat: No active combat encounter - start one first.
CPR-CHUD.warn.notYourTurn: It is not this combatant's turn.
CPR-CHUD.warn.noNetGear: No equipped cyberdeck or no active netrunning role configured.
